title: cineraria balbisiana
intro: Cineraria balbisiana, also known as the cineraria or blue marguerite, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cineraria balbisiana include its ability to improve eyesight, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Cineraria balbisiana is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
